---
title: "Teaching"
pagetitle: "Teaching — Hugo Trad"
description: "Courses taught and planned at Africa Business School (UM6P) and elsewhere."
lang: en
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/teaching">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/enseignement">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/teaching">
---

# Teaching {.hero__name}

I teach at the intersection of experimental methods, cognitive psychology, and organizational behaviour — at PhD, Master, and executive levels.

## Courses taught

```{=html}
<ul class="timeline">
  <li>
    <span class="timeline__date">2026</span>
    <div class="timeline__body">
      <strong>Experimental Methods</strong>
      <span class="timeline__sub">PhD · Africa Business School · UM6P</span>
      <p>Reverse-classroom and Socratic format. Students build a registered report from question to analysis plan, critiqued at every step.</p>
    </div>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="timeline__date">2024 —</span>
    <div class="timeline__body">
      <strong>Behavioural Insights Applied to Organizations</strong>
      <span class="timeline__sub">Africa Business School · UM6P</span>
      <p>How behavioural science evidence is translated into organizational practice — interventions, evaluation, scaling.</p>
    </div>
  </li>
</ul>

<p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--bs-secondary);font-style:italic;">Awaiting current CV — additional courses (and prior teaching at ENS / Cogmaster) to be added.</p>
```

## Planned

```{=html}
<ul class="timeline">
  <li>
    <span class="timeline__date">2026 —</span>
    <div class="timeline__body">
      <strong>Mixed Methods / Research Methods</strong>
      <span class="timeline__sub">Master · Africa Business School · UM6P · co-taught with Abdel-Maoula Chaar</span>
      <p>Project-based, AI-literate research methods. Students design and carry an end-to-end study integrating qualitative and quantitative work.</p>
    </div>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="timeline__date">2026 —</span>
    <div class="timeline__body">
      <strong>Human Behaviour and Performance in the Workplace</strong>
      <span class="timeline__sub">School of Hospitality Business &amp; Management · UM6P</span>
      <p>Behavioural science spine for executive-track hospitality and service-sector students.</p>
    </div>
  </li>
</ul>
```
